reviews.review_description:
Goalienator is a simple yet addictive VR hockey goalie game where you train under a virtual coach. With varied exercises—from player-driven drills to machine and arcade-style challenges—it sharpens your reflexes and skills in a fun way. The leaderboard adds competitive spice, letting you compare scores with others.
Perfect for all skill levels, this game keeps you hooked with its fast-paced, reflex-driven gameplay. If you love hockey or just want a quick, engaging VR challenge, Goalienator delivers! 🏆❄️

Nice game with many modes. Good replacement for NHL Sense Arena Goalie Mode. Suggestion: prevent the stick from merging with the ice. Feels odd. Some goals also feel weird, pucks seem to go through your body even with experimental feature active. Looking forward for the fine tuning.

Gotta say your game is more fun than I thought it would be!

When do you expect the December beta update to be completed and incorporated into gameplay?  Looking forward to several of those features.

developer_response.body: Hi Jake. We are hoping to release the current beta updates to the main version of the game around late February. We are still running tests and gathering feedback in order to polish the upcoming content update

reviews.review_description: Actually feels like I'm making saves. But why the heck can't I center myself in the crease!?!?
This helps me train in the offseason, would recommend.
this game is so good and the tracking is pretty good but it would be so much better if theres leg pads that simulate it ik its hard to do but it would be so much better if they add that
The game is so good and there is lots of fun challenges to do so you are never board.
If you wanted to save pucks, you can save pucks

developer_response.body: Hi AnnieHL, sorry for delay with reply. You are indeed correct, saving pucks is the way to go. Thanks for the review !

reviews.review_title: Really good for off ice practice!
reviews.review_description: Unbelievably similar to being in front of a net and reacting to shots. Hope the developer gets what the need to fully bring this to a paid premium functioning app. I’m the mean time, still, really incredibly well done!! I’m loving this!

developer_response.body: Hi Nellituby, thank you for the review. Glad to hear you are enjoying Goalienator. While we would love to get into store as premium paid game, we are happy bringing best possible free goaltending exprience to everyone and focused on improving the game as time goes by.

reviews.review_description: This game is one of if not the best games I've ever played. it is a great game if you play hockey or soccer as a goalie, I think this is  because it helps with tracking the puck or helps you catch or block. But there is one thing make sure you either have a big I mean big space or go in the "options" area and enable  "joystick movement" if you don't have a big space.
My game wont load.  Its stuck on the title screen and all it says is "loading, please wait, [STATUS!] ACCOUNT VALIDATION FOR MC-FLEIRY"  Anyone know how to fix it?

This game is the best game I have play in awhile. it tests your reaction time and your hand eye coordination. It helps explain why being a hockey goalie is a difficult job. They for I give it 5 Stars

It has lots of different challenges that are all fun. (I like the slap shot challenge the best) you can also customize your glove and blocker and what rink you play at.
this is a good game and I like the idea, maybe add goalie pads to your legs and add like a way to place players in certain spots?
I play hockey and play goalie sometimes for fun and this is so fun

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review Pizzad, glad to hear you found Goalienator to be fun.

reviews.review_description: Game is quite playable, but still GoalieVR on Steam looks more real. Especially the physics of a flying puck, the ice and glove and stick graphics also. This is not a bad game but needs the improvement. It has a potential to be very good, thanks to different modes in it, so please make it more realistic.
I can already tell that this game will be one of my most played during the summer! Lol super fun & uniquely challenging for beer league tendies like me! Hope to see more sports like this on quest 2!

developer_response.body: Hi DarthBrodicus, sorry for delay with reply. Glad to hear you are enjoying Goalienator !

reviews.review_description: Huge fan of your game! You have some great ideas for the modes. I was thinking maybe a poke check challenge or an open netter challenge where you shoot from across the rink in an open net across maybe some kind of bumper pool type obstacles, I don't know I bet you could do something cool with those ideas, I just wanted to put them out there. Keep up the great work and I can't wait to see what you do next!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and very glad to hear you enjoy Goalienator! All great suggestions, "bumper pool type obstacle" have been under planning but still need quite bit of work before they are "predictable but random" enough, so things dont rely on pure luck which can be frustating. New updates are rolling in soon, now that Steam port is done, things should start moving faster again.

reviews.review_description:
Great goalie simulation. All kinds of challenges. Simple but very cool. Will give you a great workout. Also feel like this would be great practice for a real goalie. Give it a try it’s free!
Suggestion:
It would be very cool to have a player skating at you and randomly shooting.

reviews.review_title: Love this game, just one thing…
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing! I loved playing it at first but then I saw that all it was was training. I mean nothing wrong with training I just that I would get to be goalie in a game! I would really really love a update to have games. PLEASE do this. PLEASE. Overall definitely recommend this game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review ! "real game scenario" is quite popular suggestion and it would be awesome feature, unfortunately such game mode would need accurate and smooth animations for hockey players or everything would look very "awkward". While I love the idea, it will have to wait until proper animations for hockey players can be obtained/added.

reviews.review_description: For the price, it really does get you what you need in terms of a quick hand eye fun game. I play goalie regularly and the reactions of glove and blocked are closely aligned to the rink.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review Mike, glad to hear you enjoyed Goalienator.
